publishedAbstract: - Customers may decide to backup the Multicloud Object Gateway database (NooBaa DB) separately to the PV snapshots and their own applications.- If there is a process to backup the objects as well, it should take place after running this procedure.- The following document includes information on how to back up and restore the encryption keys for NooBaa
publishedTitle: Backup and Restore for Multicloud Object Gateway database (NooBaa DB)
